title: ParentCompositeRecordV1
description: Audit artifact. Retained when a composite REC is split into sibling AUs. Never typed. Never routed. Exists for audit and replay traceability only.

parentSourceId.description: ID of the composite REC that was split. Must reference a valid REC id.

originalText.description: Unchanged composite text from the original REC. No mutation. No trimming.

splitCount.description: Number of sibling AUs produced. Minimum 2 — a splitCount of 1 is not a composite split. Set at atomicity enforcement time.
